summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Australian Investment Analysis MVP. All backend APIs working perfectly (100% success rate). Frontend loads correctly with beautiful UI, Google Auth flow initiates properly, and all protected pages function as expected. All key features tested successfully including tax calculations, franking credits, negative gearing, Monte Carlo simulations, loan calculator, and debt-to-equity analysis.
passed_tests: Landing page loads with hero section and Get Started button
Google Auth flow initiates correctly when clicking Get Started
Tax rates API returns current 2024-25 Australian rates
Personal tax calculation API works correctly at $120,000 income
Company tax calculation API works with 25% base rate
Franking credits calculator API calculates imputation credits correctly
Negative gearing calculator API analyzes property investments
Monte Carlo simulation API runs 1000 simulations successfully
Loan calculator API with variable rate scenarios works
Debt to equity ratio calculator API functions correctly
Full scenario analysis API provides comprehensive investment analysis
Dashboard loads correctly for authenticated users
Tax Analysis page navigation and calculation works
Property Portfolio page allows property input and analysis
Monte Carlo Simulation page runs simulations with results display
Loan Calculator page calculates repayments and shows variable rate scenarios
All navigation between protected pages works seamlessly
